label_descriptions.none: Sentence contains no deadline or date-related information
label_descriptions.expiration: Sentence describes an expiration or termination clause (explicit date or duration-based)
label_descriptions.effective: Sentence describes the effective date or start date of the agreement
label_descriptions.renewal: Sentence describes an automatic renewal or extension clause

note: deadline_type (explicit vs computable) is derived downstream from NER output — EXP_DATE found → explicit, DURATION found → computable

input.sentence: This Agreement shall expire on December 31, 2025, unless terminated earlier by either party.

examples.description: Expiration — computable (duration from effective date, no explicit date)

input.sentence: The initial term of this Agreement shall be three years from the Effective Date.
This Agreement shall be effective as of January 1, 2024, upon execution by both parties.
The Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless either party provides written notice of termination.

examples.description: None — boilerplate contract language, no deadline

input.sentence: Each party agrees to keep confidential all proprietary information disclosed under this Agreement.
